title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nike India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nike India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
